violations.text: Food was observed held at 44-47 degrees Fahrenheit in the mini refrigerator in classroom #2. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Per person in charge, chicken pot pie had been in the refrigerator since the day previous day. Chicken pot pie was voluntarily disposed of (see attached disposal form). All other food was delivered about 2 hours prior to inspection. Food was relocated to another refrigeration unit. The ambient air temperature was observed at a fluctuating temperature of 46-41 degrees Fahrenheit during time of inspection. Refrigerator was taken out of service and must not be used until it can maintain an internal food temperature of 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below. Refrigerator must be repaired/replaced/adjusted. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/03/2023
